subject: Re:
body:
what does he do???

--- Rahna Jalashgar <rjalashgar@nysgmail.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey
> There was something i wanted to ask you about
> regarding my boyfriend,
> George.  I was wondering if there was some way that
> maybe you could put
> him in touch with the right person or people in
> regards to finding a
> job.  He quit his job a few weeks ago and he's
> actively looking and has
> had luck in interviewing but i get the sense that he
> is starting to lose
> his ambition because he doesn't want a postion that
> is going nowhere.
> He is a really intelligent person and is capable of
> much more than he
> has been doing!  His undergraduate degree is in
> finance and his graduate
> degree is in Information systems, specifically
> project management.  I
> totally understand if it doesn't work but I just
> thought i would ask.  I
> actually didn't really mention to him that i was
> going to ask you but i
> just hate to see potential get wasted so i wanted to
> try and help him
> out somehow if i could! hopefully he won't be mad at
> me!  haha
> Thank you so much!
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
what does he do???

--- Rahna Jalashgar rjalashgar@nysgmail.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey
There was something i wanted to ask you about
regarding my boyfriend,
George. I was wondering if there was some way that
maybe you could put
him in touch with the right person or people in
regards to finding a
job. He quit his job a few weeks ago and he's
actively looking and has
had luck in interviewing but i get the sense that he
is starting to lose
his ambition because he doesn't want a postion that
is going nowhere.
He is a really intelligent person and is capable of
much more than he
has been doing! His undergraduate degree is in
finance and his graduate
degree is in Information systems, specifically
project management. I
totally understand if it doesn't work but I just
thought i would ask. I
actually didn't really mention to him that i was
going to ask you but i
just hate to see potential get wasted so i wanted to
try and help him
out somehow if i could! hopefully he won't be mad at
me! haha
Thank you so much!
